headline: Nvidia (NVDA) Faces Fresh Rack Server Pressure As AMD Launches Helios
summary: AMD has launched its Helios AI rack server platform, directly targeting the same rack-scale AI infrastructure segment as NVIDIA. The new AMD platform is being rolled out with agreements from major industry players that intend to deploy Helios in upcoming AI data center builds. This development introduces a fresh competitive threat to NVIDIA's AI rack systems, with potential implications for how large customers allocate future AI infrastructure spending. NVIDIA, traded as NasdaqGS:NVDA, now...

headline: Intel Jumps 6% on RBC’s Q2 Beat Call, AMD Rises 4%, Broadcom Climbs 3% as Chip Rally Resumes

headline: This Week In Cloud AI - AMD and Microsoft Partner to Boost AI Infrastructure on Azure
summary: Recent developments in the field of Cloud AI include the strengthening of the strategic partnership between AMD and Microsoft, with a focus on deploying next-generation AI infrastructure via Microsoft Azure. As part of this collaboration, Microsoft will implement AMD's Helios Rackscale Solution to enhance AI model inference capabilities across its services and those of its customers. Additionally, Azure will introduce new VM series powered by AMD's latest EPYC processors and expand its...

headline: Spectro Cloud Launches PaletteAI Inference Launchpad to Reduce Enterprise Token Costs by up to 70%
summary: SAN JOSE, Calif., July 21, 2026--Spectro Cloud, a leading provider of AI infrastructure management software, today launched PaletteAI Inference Launchpad, a turnkey, locally managed solution designed to help enterprises reduce token costs by as much as 70% and run AI inference closer to their data, applications and users.
